review_body_text: No ot pay even you come earlier and need to stayback. Bad pay. They even dont care to tell you about new bank policy. TL also useless, dont how to help to solve the problem, always ask you refer to your own note during training. Overall they are useless and dont even care about you, and will kerah you selagi boleh
High expectation to deliver but minimal training to support expectation. High call volume but under staffed. Daily calls of unhappy customers calling to comlpain
Not for everyone. Learn as much as you can and get out. Two types of employees. The progressive and the insecure. The insecure are immature, unprofessional, real bullies.

Good benefit, culture good and above average pay but bad for high management. Need to improve on performance evaluation through statistics else the performance will just be manipulated for their shoe polisher.
Good benefit with modern office design. Politics are prevalent and management is unsupportive and you will be gaslighted if you speak up. Can enjoy free coffee in pantry.
Good benefit with modern office design. Can be a good learning place. Management is not supportive and you will become the villain for speaking up (depending on department I guess).
good place to work , with great benefit Tight dateline with office politic as expected. The higher your post is, the more politic will come to you, no matter how you want to avoid it.

review_title: Work life balance but low salary increment
review_body_text: Pro : nice and friendly colleagues Con: Low salary increment and low bonuses. Terrible superiors with little knowledge and like to blame staffs when anything happens.

Fast-paced working culture with overload work to attend cm enquiries within time. working in an environment where you feel trapped when every second counts and can be an issue even for prayer and toilet breaks were exceed the limit time. However, its great experience to be able working with this bank, learn in hardway but my mental not able to carry on.
Good rate for loan, is a strong point to attract loan application. The turnover rate of staff is high due to low sales volume. People always come and go.

review_title: Good money but environment is killing you
review_body_text: Working 8 months here and resign. Work is a bit pressure, but bearable. If you working different shift with your batch, it so hard to have conversations with others. Everybody there JUST WORK. You are dead there. Dead soul working machine. If you emotionally strong, this is the best place. Pay is good always have double pay ot

review_title: Friendly senior staff and comfortable working environment
review_body_text: Friendly staff and senior guide me patiently during probation period, comfortable working environment and nice superior. Work life balance culture able to learn a lot of thing there.
pros_text: Healthcare and free lunch during MCO

review_body_text: I was hired with contract because this job is high turnover, no wonder lo. If you didn't not finish the contract time, you will be charge Rm2500 to pay to them as the training bond. The job was so stressing your mind. Everyday have to hear complaints which is the part of the job. If you priorities your mental health, I do not recommend this job. They have the kpi you need to meet, they always keep telling you to shorten the time call but you need to wrap in CRM. It so stressful. If the queries still pending and appeal, you still need to keep on updates where we have many calls that we tend to forget. I got anxiety because always intimidate with the calls. If you handle chat or email, I still consider, but if inbound or outbound calls, think on your mental health. Pros- if you achieve target on that day, they will treat the meal. They provide free beverage vending machine which provide you coffee, cordial and refreshing beverage. You have 1 hour break. Then 30 minutes extra. You have to sacrifice your time because some shift can end at 1am, and start at 6am. Salary is high for fresh graduate which is 2.7k. Your manager is so supportive and understanding, but the call environment too stressful. 4 minutes from lrt ampang Park, which in located at intermark mall.

The salary is good for fresh graduates. However the there are too much workload and follow up need to be done after end shift. Too often I need to stay back after end shift to complete work amd cannot claim OT as it only count if taking calls.

There was training provided. Fun working environment & benefits were great. The workplace culture is enjoyable and colleagous are friendly. Senior/team leaders are very helpful and supportive. Just needed to be mentally strong when communicate with customer.
pros_text: Management is great, suppportive subornates, training provided, overtime paid

review_title: A challenging workplace with many concurrent projects to manage and daily back to back projects meetings and software applications testing.
review_body_text: A well managed organization with strict and extensive risk management in place. Colleagues are all busy with their duties and achieving results leaving very little time for interpersonal interactions. A typical day for Team Lead is packed with projects meeting, discussions leaving very little time to perform paperwork, administrative work, planning and analysis during working hours, as need to work until almost wee hour daily. The hardest part of the job is workload and the most enjoyable part is that you get to learn a lots.
cons_text: A place to develop and fully utilize your skills

review_body_text: The job are fun to take as knowledge & experience but bad in culture of work. U can be a good worker if you work with a good leader. Recommend depend on department

You’ll have to ask for permission to even just go to the washroom especially during high call volume. Customer complaint = your problem regardless was just customer’s emotion with the bank Superior shouting here and there to meet SLA 24 hours high call volume They’ll fix your break time means u can’t break with your buddy AL is constantly not being approved have to book months ahead Being trained for many skills means more responsibility but salary remained
most of the times colleagues willing to help along. No OT require for my team , On and off most of time. manage to have work life balance
cons_text: slow promotion at operation team even after five years persue

review_body_text: Outdated system and processes are very manual, lots of excel reports to prepare, many levels of system approvals going through different departments. Mostly good colleagues that are very friendly and willing to guide.
